user_query: We are rebranding from "First United Church" to "New Hope Community Church" and need our on-site content and metadata aligned to the new brand while improving SEO. Please use only the local files in input/ and produce all outputs under output/ as described. Inputs: - input/site_pages.csv (slug,title,meta_description,word_count,traffic_last_30_days,page_type) - input/brand_guidelines.md (voice, naming, tone, CTAs) - input/keyword_map.yaml (primary and secondary keywords by slug) - input/content/about.md, input/content/ministries.md, input/content/visit.md (existing page copy to be rewritten) Deliverables: 1) Rewrite content: - Edit and rewrite input/content/about.md, input/content/ministries.md, and input/content/visit.md to reflect the brand guidelines. - Replace all mentions of the old name with "New Hope Community Church" exactly. Keep references to Springfield where natural. - Maintain a clear, welcoming tone per the guidelines and incorporate the primary keyword for that page (from input/keyword_map.yaml) in the H1 or opening paragraph (once, naturally). - Include a brief call to action at the end (e.g., Plan Your Visit, Get Connected) aligned with the guidelines. - Save rewritten files to output/content/about.md, output/content/ministries.md, and output/content/visit.md. 2) Optimize titles and meta descriptions: - For each row in input/site_pages.csv, generate a new title and meta description using the primary keyword from input/keyword_map.yaml for that slug. The brand name "New Hope Community Church" must appear in both. - Constraints: title length must be 45–60 characters inclusive; meta description length must be 150–160 characters inclusive; both must read naturally. - Create output/seo/optimized_meta.csv with columns: slug,old_title,old_meta_description,new_title,new_meta_description,new_title_length,new_meta_length,includes_primary_keyword(0/1),includes_brand_name(0/1). 3) Prioritize pages for SEO work with a deterministic score: - For each row in input/site_pages.csv, compute these flags based on the existing (old) data:   a) title_contains_primary (0/1): 1 if old title contains the primary keyword (case-insensitive), else 0.   b) meta_length_ok (0/1): 1 if old meta_description length is between 150 and 160 inclusive, else 0.   c) content_short (0/1): 1 if word_count < 400, else 0. - Compute normalized_traffic = (traffic_last_30_days − min_traffic) / (max_traffic − min_traffic). If max_traffic == min_traffic, set normalized_traffic = 0.5 for all. - Let page_type_bonus = 1 if page_type == "Core", else 0. - Compute priority_score = 0.5*normalized_traffic + 0.2*content_short + 0.15*(1 − title_contains_primary) + 0.1*(1 − meta_length_ok) + 0.05*page_type_bonus. - Output output/seo/priority_report.csv with columns: slug,traffic_last_30_days,word_count,page_type,primary_keyword,title_contains_primary,meta_length_ok,content_short,normalized_traffic,priority_score,rank. Sort by priority_score descending; ties broken by traffic_last_30_days descending, then slug ascending. - Also output output/seo/issues.csv as a filtered subset of priority_report.csv containing only rows where content_short==1 or title_contains_primary==0 or meta_length_ok==0, sorted in the same order. 4) Compose a status update: - Create output/report/status_update.md addressed to the Senior Pastor and Communications Team. Include:   a) Summary: pages reviewed (count), pages with issues (count from issues.csv), and a one-paragraph overview of the brand-aligned changes made to the three rewritten pages.   b) Top Priorities: list the top 3 slugs from priority_report.csv with their priority_score and a short reason referencing which factors contributed (e.g., short content, missing keyword in title, meta length out of range, high traffic).   c) Before/After: show one example page (e.g., the "visit" page) with its old title and meta vs. the new ones from optimized_meta.csv.   d) Next Steps: concrete recommendations for the remaining pages based on the issues.csv and the brand guidelines. Notes: - Use only the provided local files; do not use the Internet. - Ensure all output files are created even if some pages already meet the constraints. - Keep the brand name exactly as "New Hope Community Church" and adhere to the specified length constraints for the optimized metadata. Output paths to produce: - output/content/about.md - output/content/ministries.md - output/content/visit.md - output/seo/optimized_meta.csv - output/seo/priority_report.csv - output/seo/issues.csv - output/report/status_update.md All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
